name: Client Onboarding Workflow
tagline: Six stages from "contract signed" to delivered — so nothing falls through the cracks.
differentiator: A quick-reference timing table up front, then real checklists per stage — built to actually run a client through, not just describe a process in theory.
description: The exact steps to take a new client from a signed contract to a delivered project: kickoff call, data collection, work stages, check-ins, and offboarding — each with its own checklist.
whoFor: Agencies and freelancers who want every new client to feel like the tenth time you've done this, not the first.
